task_completion.description: Add required columns to the 'Shipments' sheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Shipments' sheet is visible with new columns added: 'weight_bracket', 'customer_zone', 'cost_per_kg', and 'freight_pct'.
A sheet tab named 'ZoneSummary' is visible at the bottom of the spreadsheet application.

task_completion.description: Create the matrix structure with specific zone ordering in 'ZoneSummary'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A matrix/table is visible in the 'ZoneSummary' sheet with rows for zones listed in this exact order: Southeast, South, Northeast, North, Central-West, and columns for the weight brackets (0-1kg, 1-5kg, etc.).

task_completion.description: Populate the matrix with average cost per kg values
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cells within the matrix contain numerical values representing the calculated average cost per kg for each zone and weight bracket intersection.

task_completion.description: Include row and column averages for the matrix
task_completion.visual_evidence: The matrix includes an additional row at the bottom and an additional column at the right (or similar layout) displaying the overall averages for each respective column and row.

task_completion.description: Provide summary statistics below the matrix
task_completion.visual_evidence: Below the matrix in the 'ZoneSummary' sheet, there are labels and calculated numerical values for 'Total Shipments', 'Total Freight (BRL)', and 'Avg Freight % of Price'.

task_completion.description: Save the final workbook as freight_analysis_result.xlsx
task_completion.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet application window title bar shows the filename 'freight_analysis_result.xlsx'.

integrity.description: The agent used a spreadsheet application GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a spreadsheet application interface (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) being actively used to edit the data, rather than just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used formulas instead of hardcoded values
integrity.visual_evidence: When cells are selected, the formula bar at the top of the spreadsheet application shows formulas (e.g., =IF(...), =VLOOKUP(...), =AVERAGEIFS(...)) rather than plain typed numbers.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal script to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show Python, Pandas, or other scripts being executed to directly generate the output .xlsx file without manual spreadsheet manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final workbook must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/freight_analysis_result.xlsx'. It must contain exactly these sheets: 'Shipments', 'ZoneLookup', and 'ZoneSummary'. The task requires the use of formulas, specifically IF, VLOOKUP, AVERAGEIFS, COUNTA, SUM, and AVERAGE, which should be visible in the formula bar when respective calculated cells are selected.
